title: Initialize Go module and basic project structure
description: Run `go mod init github.com/yourusername/sqlforge`, create standard directories (cmd, internal, examples, pkg), and add .gitignore + LICENSE (Apache 2.0).
acceptance_criteria: Directory structure matches the planned layout (cmd/sqlforge, internal/parser, etc.)

title: Add Cobra CLI framework and root command
description: Add github.com/spf13/cobra dependency and create a basic root command with version and help text.

title: Add Makefile with build targets
description: Create Makefile with wasm, build, cli, clean targets.
acceptance_criteria: Targets: wasm, build, cli, clean, test

title: Embed Polyglot WASM file placeholder
description: Add internal/parser/polyglot.wasm placeholder and go:embed in parser.go.
acceptance_criteria: File exists (even if empty for now)

title: Implement basic Polyglot WASM loader with wazero
description: Create internal/parser/parser.go with NewParser() using wazero and WASI.

title: Add transpile function to Polyglot parser
description: Implement Transpile(sql, fromDialect, toDialect) that calls the WASM module.
acceptance_criteria: transpile command works for simple SELECT

title: Add parse to AST function
description: Implement ParseToAST that returns JSON AST from Polyglot.
acceptance_criteria: ParseToAST returns valid JSON for valid SQL

title: Create model/asset.go with basic struct
description: Define Asset struct with Name, SQL, Config map, Materialized, Grain, etc.

title: Implement model loader for SQL files with @ comments
description: Parse -- @key: value comments from .sql files.

title: Implement model reference resolution via structural table name lookup (fully clean, no {{ ref() }})
description: Resolve table names like 'stg_events' to model files using project structure + Polyglot AST table extraction. No templating.
acceptance_criteria: stg_events resolves correctly to staging model

title: Implement basic DAG builder in graph/
description: Build dependency graph from parsed refs.

title: Implement AST-based fingerprinting
description: Create stable hash from normalized AST + config (ignore whitespace).

title: Create state/store.go with SQLite
description: Set up embedded SQLite for environments and model states.
acceptance_criteria: CRUD methods for Environment and ModelState

title: Implement state/manager.go
description: High-level GetOrCreateEnv and SaveModelState.

title: Implement virtual/env.go
description: Basic virtual environment orchestration.

title: Add ClickHouse zero-copy clone helpers
description: Implement ClickHouseZeroCopyClone and VirtualView functions.
acceptance_criteria: Correct DDL generated for CLONE and VIEW

title: Wire virtual/manager.go with ClickHouse runner stub
description: Connect virtual manager to runner interface.

title: Create ClickHouse runner stub
description: Basic Exec method for ClickHouse using database/sql + clickhouse driver.

title: Implement plan engine core logic
description: Compare fingerprints and build execution plan list.
acceptance_criteria: Plan struct with ChangedModels and Impact

title: Add impact analysis to plan
description: Detect downstream affected models using DAG.

title: Implement apply execution logic
description: Execute plan steps (clone, view refresh, incremental run).

title: Add progress reporting and cost estimation to apply
description: Show [1/9] style output and basic ClickHouse cost estimate.

title: Create full agentic_retail_2026 example structure
description: Create directories and placeholder files.

title: Update agentic_retail_2026 example models to fully clean SQL (remove any {{ ref() }})
description: Rewrite all example models using direct table names.
acceptance_criteria: All models use clean SQL table references

title: Write customer_360.sql (agentic core model)
description: Include behavioral features and @ tags.

title: Write daily_metrics.sql and ab_test_results.sql
description: Add the remaining marts models.

title: Create sqlforge.yml and sources.yml for example
description: Basic config and sources definition.

title: Implement env create CLI command
description: Wire cobra command for env create with flags.

title: Implement plan CLI command
description: With --detailed flag and nice output.
acceptance_criteria: sqlforge plan shows changes and impact

title: Implement apply CLI command
description: With --yes, --dry-run, parallel support.

title: Add run, parse, transpile CLI commands
description: Basic wiring.

title: Implement light AI client (Ollama first)
description: Simple HTTP client for explain/suggest.
acceptance_criteria: sqlforge ai explain works with context

title: Create ARCHITECTURE.md and ROADMAP.md
description: Document Level 2 + stretch targets.
acceptance_criteria: Docs are comprehensive and include Mermaid where useful

title: Add basic tests for parser and fingerprint
description: Unit tests for core logic.
acceptance_criteria: go test ./... passes for parser and graph

title: Implement Native Semantic Layer parser
description: Create YAML parser for metrics.yml to treat metrics as first-class citizens in the DAG.
acceptance_criteria: YAML parses correctly into Go structs

title: Build ANSI SQL Semantic Compiler
description: Generate dialect-agnostic SELECT/GROUP BY queries from metric definitions and requested dimensions.

title: Implement query CLI command
description: Wire cobra command for query with --dimensions flag.
acceptance_criteria: sqlforge query metric env --dimensions x,y works

title: Implement Real-Time Streaming engine integration
description: Add support for ClickHouse MaterializedView and Kafka engines for continuous streaming patterns.
acceptance_criteria: Kafka topics map to virtual envs

title: Build abstract virtual Runner factory (Multi-Dialect)
description: Abstract LiveRunner to support Databricks, DuckDB, Postgres, Snowflake, VeloDB, and Apache Doris drivers alongside ClickHouse.

title: Add Fuzz and Property Testing to Semantic Compiler
description: Implement fuzz testing and strict regex validation to ensure the semantic compiler cannot panic or be subjected to SQL injection via malicious dimensions.
acceptance_criteria: Fuzz test passes 3M+ permutations without panic

title: Build End-to-End CLI Testing Framework
description: Create test/e2e/cli_test.go utilizing os/exec to programmatically test the full execution of sqlforge plan/apply against the agentic_retail mock dataset to verify SQLite state handling.
acceptance_criteria: test verifies state.db accurately tracks models

title: Build Developer Experience GUI (TUI & Web)
description: Implement a Bubble Tea TUI for apply execution and a React Flow Web GUI for DAG exploration.
acceptance_criteria: sqlforge ui serves a local visualizer
sqlforge apply uses a dynamic bubble tea TUI

title: Design & Implement Complex Incremental Materialization
description: Design cross-dialect strategies for incremental model materializations (MERGE, UPSERT, Append) with unique key conflict resolution.
acceptance_criteria: Runners implemented for ClickHouse, DuckDB, Postgres

title: Add MCP server package skeleton
description: Create internal/mcp/server.go with basic HTTP router stub

title: Implement MCP JSON-RPC handler
description: Add JSON-RPC 2.0 endpoint at /mcp

title: Define MCP Tool Registry with rich schemas
description: Tool struct + parameter schemas optimized for Claude/Cursor/OpenAI tool calling
acceptance_criteria: 6+ tools with natural language descriptions and JSON schemas

title: Implement list_models MCP tool
description: Return all models with metadata, fingerprint, last applied

title: Implement get_model MCP tool
description: Full model details + Polyglot AST summary + lineage

title: Implement list_metrics and query_metric MCP tools
description: Semantic layer integration

title: Implement plan_change MCP tool
description: Takes proposed change (SQL diff or natural language) → full plan

title: Implement apply_change MCP tool
description: Execute approved plan with safety checks

title: Implement explain MCP tool
description: AI + AST powered explanations

title: Add `sqlforge mcp serve` CLI command
description: Start server with flags (--port, --local, --api-key)

title: Add Server-Sent Events (SSE) streaming support
description: Support streaming responses for long-running operations (plan, query, apply)

title: Implement WebSocket endpoint for interactive sessions
description: /mcp/ws for live plan approval, step-by-step execution, and real-time agent feedback
acceptance_criteria: WebSocket accepts connections and handles messages

title: Add live plan approval flow over WebSocket
description: Agent proposes → plan shown → agent approves/rejects steps in real time

title: Implement auth middleware for MCP
description: API key validation + local-only mode

title: Add request logging and audit trail
description: Log all MCP calls with model touched, agent ID, outcome

title: Generate OpenAPI + MCP Tool Schema
description: Auto-serve /openapi.json and /tools.json

title: Implement graceful shutdown for MCP server
description: Handle SIGTERM, close connections cleanly
acceptance_criteria: Server shuts down without data corruption

title: Add MCP health check endpoint
description: GET /health and /mcp/health

title: Update ARCHITECTURE.md with full MCP section
description: Include architecture diagram (Mermaid), agent interaction examples
acceptance_criteria: Docs explain how agents use sqlforge

title: Add MCP e2e tests with httptest + WebSocket
description: Test key tool calls and streaming

title: Add example agent prompt templates
description: docs/agent-examples.md with Claude/Cursor prompts
acceptance_criteria: Ready-to-use prompts for common agent tasks

title: Implement rate limiting & abuse protection for MCP
description: Basic token bucket per API key

title: Data Quality Testing
description: Port standard test macros (not_null, unique, accepted_values) into native Go verifications that run automatically during apply.
acceptance_criteria: RunDataQualityTests parses configs and runs assertions against Runner.QueryCount
